programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: In Too Deep
programme.desc: On the edge of the Bermuda Triangle, an Army veteran dive master and a Cajun boat captain take on relentless thunderstorms and battle dehydration as they try navigate more than 20 miles of open ocean in the ultimate test of sink or swim.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island From Hell
programme.desc: Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian Island for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island of Tears
programme.desc: Max and Bianca face off with aggressive caiman, boa constrictors, large spiders, and thorny mangroves in this Superfan challenge on a tropical island in Panama.

programme.title: Movie: Jaws
programme.desc: A great white shark attacks and terrorizes the residents of a Long Island beach town.

programme.title: Sharks of the Badlands
programme.desc: With white sharks infesting the waters off Cape Cod, Greg Skomal and Kina Scollay are testing new cutting-edge technology for shark detecting. If all goes well, they will bring it to Cape Cod to make the water safe again.

programme.title: Movie: Jaws
programme.desc: A great white shark attacks and terrorizes the residents of a Long Island beach town.

programme.title: Alien Sharks: Stranger Fins
programme.desc: Dr. Craig O'Connell seeks sawsharks in the Bass Strait, while Victoria Elena Vasquez and Dr. David Ebert look for goblin sharks in Tokyo Bay; they also find ghost sharks, frilled sharks, and lantern sharks.

programme.title: SharkCam Strikes Back
programme.desc: A celebration of the discoveries the team has made in the last six years and a look at some of the disasters.

programme.title: Isle of Jaws: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A team ventures to the famed Isle of Jaws off the West Australian coast to find answers to whether great whites can recognize and prefer the company of a blood relative.

programme.title: Cuba's Secret Shark Lair
programme.desc: In 1945, one of the largest sharks ever recorded was captured in Cuban waters, a great white named 'El Monstruo.' Two teams of researchers divide and conquer in search of Cuba's massive great hammerhead in 'The Queen' and 'El Monstruo'-sized great white.

programme.title: Zombie Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Diver and conservationist Eli Martinez explores a catatonic zombie-like state in sharks called 'tonic immobility' and sets out to solve a mystery of predators using it on massive great whites.

programme.title: Shark Lockdown
programme.desc: With the oceans quiet from the global lockdown, Kina Scollay gets in a dive cage in the search for monster shark 747.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Fin of Fury
programme.desc: Using incredible new cameras and high tech underwater gadgetry, filmmaker Jeff Kurr and his team embark on a world-wide mission to track down the missing 'mega-shark,' Colossus.

programme.title: Monster Mako
programme.desc: In the Gulf of Mexico, scientists outfit a mako shark with cameras to reveal the mysteries of its unseen world.

programme.title: Tyson Vs. Jaws: Rumble on the Reef
programme.desc: Mike Tyson learns how to TKO a shark in the name of research as he goes up against sharks.

programme.title: Alien Sharks: First Contact
programme.desc: Researches attempt to make first contact with mysterious alien sharks lurking in beneath the waves in deep water.

programme.title: Air Jaws: The Hunted
programme.desc: Experts investigate why five great white sharks washed up dead on the beaches in South Africa in 2017.

programme.title: Guy Fieri's Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Shark Week goes to the Bahamas with Guy Fieri and his Hunter to experience local cuisine and to explore and understand what makes the waters an all-you-can-eat buffet for so many shark species.

programme.title: Phelps vs. Shark: Great Gold vs. Great White
programme.desc: Sharks, the world's fastest and most efficient predators. Michael Phelps, our greatest champion to ever get in the water. A 'Shark Week' first brings an event so monumental no one has ever attempted it before.

programme.title: Shaq Does Shark Week
programme.desc: To overcome his fear of sharks, Shaq trains with ex-Navy/ Marine comedian Rob Riggle.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard is lumpy, he has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Spoonful of Cyst
programme.desc: Stephen's large, bulbous nose gets him unwanted attention, and he hopes Dr. Lee can help. Veronica wants to be free of secrets, including the bump on her butt crack. Marty has a large, 30-year-old growth on his shoulder that he is ready to remove himself.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap: Rather Die Than Pay Retail
programme.desc: The Trans try to help their youngest daughter pursue her modeling dream in their own frugal fashion. The Watsons are planning their daughter's wedding on a $750 budget. The Guileses are trying to renovate their 100-year-old house as cheaply as possible.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap: Saving for a Rainy Day
programme.desc: The Watsons get cheap engagement photos, and Ashley and Colby try to conceive. The Tran family enjoys a free round of golf. Becky Guiles looks for cheap ways to tear down a wall. The Claytons get their allowance and wash the family car.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Time Cheaters
programme.desc: Some people will do anything to save time. Time cheaters go to extreme measures to shave seconds off their daily routines. From doing the dishes while showering, to body waxing at work, they all go to extreme lengths to make every second count!

programme.title: An Animal Saved My Life: Creature Crusaders

programme.title: An Animal Saved My Life: A Hero's Tail
programme.desc: A cat rescues a young boy from a vicious dog attack, and a K9 Chief puts his life on the line. Plus, a German Shepherd saves her owner during a medical emergency.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the Mogul's Return!
programme.desc: At an auction in Montclair, Ivy rakes in the dollar bills, while Darrell keeps things old school and finds something that will launch him to new heights. Also, Brandi worries Jarrod's hangover will get in the way of buying, and Dave just won't stay away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Man in Black is Back
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked to see Dave Hester return to the auctions with a vengeance, but even the Mogul can't stop the buyers from scoring great units in Huntington Beach. Also, Darrell tries to get Brandon in 'tip-top' shape, and Ivy must change up his game.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bid Strong and Prosper
programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bowling for Brandi
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon are excited to return to West Covina as it is a hidden honeypot for the duo. While it's off the beaten path, Jarrod and Brandi decide to follow Darrell's lead into the Inland Empire. Plus, Ivy searches for low level merchandise.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Mission to Mars
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack are headed to the Mars Desert Research Station in Utah. As the men traverse one of the most beautiful states in America, they must also endure the long drive to San Rafael Swell, where the research station is located.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Illin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy learn about competitive lumberjacks. When Jack gets the flu, Ozzy visits a coffee roaster himself. After Jack recovers, they visit an oyster farm and then visit a medium.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Unidentified Flying Ozzy
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack pack up a camper and travel to the home of all things UFO: Roswell, New Mexico. While Jack is a true UFO believer and loves camping, Ozzy is a skeptic and loathes the outdoors when it's freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal get a little too greedy with fellow shoppers at the market and then offer disservices to a focus group. Tonight's loser learns that the grass is always pinker on the other side.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Breaking Wind Beneath My Wings
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Breaking Wind Beneath My Wings
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nutrition

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince

programme.title: Food Paradise: Click on the Link
programme.desc: Whether they're long links, plump patties or spicy little slices, everyone loves sausage and we're sampling the best the US has to offer. Start off by checking out a chorizo burger in Jacksonville, Florida, and getting down on a sausage sampler.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Global Grub
programme.desc: Experience a vast array of global food, from Mexican tortas to Greek lasagna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Racing Through Charlotte
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out high octane joints in Charlotte, North Carolina, with NASCAR driver Clint Bowyer. First, the relocated Triple-D alum dishin' out dynamite burgers and a unique spin on shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven is stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint is loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Time Tested Treasures
programme.desc: Host John Catucci travels to Ontario's wilderness to discover a hidden gem in Busters BBQ, where blueberries are the key to killer sauce. John also visits the Argo Café in Vancouver, B.C. where they serve up everything from your typical diner.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Play Like A Girl
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, volunteer for snack duty with the non-profit organization Play Like a Girl, which encourages girls to participate in sports to build confidence.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: The Bluebird Cafe
programme.desc: Dishes include cornbread and chili bites, orange barbeque steak kabobs, and charred lemon ricotta dip with dippers.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All the Colors of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is celebrating spring's colourful bounty by creating a visual feast that delights the senses and her guest, The Kitchen's Katie Lee. The menu includes golden raspberry goat cheese crostini, roasted rainbow carrots, and more.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: One More Time, It's a Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is always looking for the latest and greatest ways to prepare and use grilled chicken. She's sharing her latest tricks for picture-perfect birds with recipes like chicken fried rice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Merc Deliveries
programme.desc: Work on Ree Drummond's mercantile store and deli is going full steam ahead, and she's cooking to keep the construction wheels in motion. First, fabulous Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwiches piled high with crunchy coleslaw.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night on the Town
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is having a night on the town with Ladd at a big bash for the Osage Cattlemen's Convention, so she's taken care of dinner for the kids to eat back at home. She prepares a slam-in-the-oven mini meatballs pasta bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 3 Apps and a Cocktail
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has cocktail hour and a summer party on her mind. She puts her ranch kitchen spin on a BBQ shrimp cocktail, makes irresistible buffalo chicken meatball skewers, bakes bacon ranch cheesy bread and mixes up blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Pasta Favorites
programme.desc: It's non-stop pasta with a collection of delicious ranch favourites from down the years. There's a feisty fiesta mac & cheese casserole to stock the freezer.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Daily Gratitude
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is showing her friend and Today Show co-anchor Hoda Kotb a great summer meal she can make for her family. Their menu includes flank steak with lemon lime herb sauce and smoky tomato eggplant dip with grilled sourdough.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food, Fast!
programme.desc: Trisha invites pro racer Danica Patrick to make a pit stop in her kitchen. Trisha starts the day with recipes that are quick and easy to make, like a Cubano Sandwich with Quick Pickles, Pressure Cooker Potatoes with Smoky Aioli, Three Bean Salad and more.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Space Kitchen
programme.desc: Following a visit to Space Center Houston with her husband, Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood is inspired to get in the kitchen and make some recipes that are out of this world. Her space-inspired menu starts with Buzzed Aldrin cocktails.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer in a Snap
programme.desc: The Kitchen is keeping it easy and breezy for summer with recipes to make in a snap. Katie Lee makes sesame shrimp and greens with rice foil packs. The hosts make stuffed grilled avocados loaded with their favourite guacamole ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grocery Rush
programme.desc: Guy gives the chefs three turbo-charged games with only 15-20 minutes to shop, cook and plate, making breakfast, lunch and dinner over three short rounds.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Team Games
programme.desc: Dynamic duos are taking over Flavortown Market to show they have the teamwork skills to take on Guy Fieri's games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: $12 Meal Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri pushes the culinary limits of four Flavortown rookies by challenging them to cook a day's worth of meals with a budget of just $12 for each round.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: I....am Vampier
programme.desc: Victor enters a film festival but afraid his work isn't good enough, he decides to copy someone else's.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Snuggle Time

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Communicate Openly

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Royal Jelly
programme.desc: Bumblebee offers to help Robin with his leadership skills by teaching him how to act like a queen bee.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Strength of a Grown Man
programme.desc: Needing a hero with shrinking powers, but forgetting about Bumblebee, Robin invites The Atom to join their fight against the Brain.

programme.title: Roseanne: My Name Is Bev
programme.desc: After being arrested for drinking and driving, Bev announces that she is an alcoholic. Roseanne fears that Bev may be lying to mitigate the repercussions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Bed and Bored
programme.desc: Feigning illness for preferential treatment, Roseanne claims the doctor has ordered a week of bed rest. However, her grand scheme quickly turns stale when she finds herself bedridden and bored. Jackie and Bev come to blows.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Shot a Little Girl
programme.desc: When Alan realizes Louis thinks he's cool, he starts breaking Walden's rules in order to keep it that way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sex With An Animated Ed Asner
programme.desc: Alan and Walden befriend three moms at a kids' gym but things get complicated when Walden becomes attracted to one of them. Meanwhile, Alan goes out for a girls' night with a group of moms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey
programme.desc: Walden and Alan are determined to convince their foster child, Louis, that Santa Claus is real.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bouncy, Bouncy, Bouncy, Lyndsey
programme.desc: Walden discovers how challenging it is to be intimate with women with his foster son, Louis, in the house. Also, Herb asks Alan if he can go on a date with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Here I Come, Pants!
programme.desc: Alan takes it upon himself to help Walden keep Louis after the social worker discovers he and Walden are not really a gay couple.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For Whom the Booty Calls
programme.desc: Walden joins a group for adoptive fathers and finds it to be a nice escape from Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Did You Check With the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?
programme.desc: Charlie rethinks his ways after he, Alan and Jake must cheer up a dejected Evelyn. Meanwhile, Charlie teaches Jake some lessons about screening calls from women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snootful
programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Phase One, Complete
programme.desc: Charlie is uncomfortable when his latest romantic conquest befriends both Jake and Evelyn. Alan gets too competitive when playing a board game with Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Merry Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Charlie tries to win back a former flame by hosting a large Thanksgiving dinner with his family.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Camel Filters and Pheremones
programme.desc: Jake develops a crush on Berta's gorgeous granddaughter, Prudence. Meanwhile, Rose's dream comes true when Charlie pretends that Rose is his girlfriend in order to fend off the flirtatious 16-year-old.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sarah Like Puny Alan
programme.desc: In order to secure a date, Charlie volunteers a flu-ridden Alan to escort the woman's sister and tries desperately to speed up the recovery. But when Charlie is the one who gets ill before the date, their roles get reversed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Sleepless in Mar Vista
programme.desc: After taking some new sleeping pills, Christine wakes up to discover she made several embarrassing phone calls while knocked out.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: After sleeping with Richard's wildly attractive brother, Christine learns an astonishing secret.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Christine attempts to become politically active by volunteering to collect names for an environmental cause. While soliciting signatures, an activist on the opposite side of the issue confronts her and the two find themselves in a bitter battle.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Christine almost gets Mr. Harris fired after unintentionally sending all the parents at Ritchie's school an email revealing that their parent/ teacher relationship may be something more. Meanwhile, Christine gets some surprising news from Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Faith Off
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard has been hired to remodel 'meanie mom Lindsay's bathroom, she can't help but intervene and make sure he doesn't screw up the job and risk their reputation at Ritchie's school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: My Big Fat Sober Wedding
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to stay sober at a friend's wedding doesn't keep her from blurting out a secret.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Friends
programme.desc: Friendships take an unexpected turn when Christine, Richard, Matthew and Barb end up in a raunchy hotel in the desert, while following Ritchie to a school camping trip.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Frasier
programme.desc: Christine realizes that one reckless evening may have jeopardized her chance to begin dating Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Big Bang
programme.desc: After waiting to consummate her relationship with Mr. Harris, Christine is finally ready, until Barb gives her reason to worry. Matthew rethinks medical school after discovering that his assigned cadaver is a former neighbour.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens
programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when a beloved freshwater crocs stops laying eggs. Later, a bison embryo makes a cross-country journey for a groundbreaking project, and keepers train a coalition of cheetahs to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when a beloved freshwater crocs stops laying eggs. Later, a bison embryo makes a cross-country journey for a groundbreaking project, and keepers train a coalition of cheetahs to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bushfire Rescue
programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: A Baby Giraffe's Tall Order
programme.desc: After the birth of Talbert the giraffe, complications arise and the Irwins worry for his life. Robert rescues an entangled black swan caught in fishing line, while Bindi and Chandler plan for Kingston the rhino's first birthday.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Legends of the Galapagos
programme.desc: The Irwins and Harriet, a 168-year-old tortoise taken from the Galapagos Islands by Charles Darwin, go on an adventure to see what her homeland and living relatives are like.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Sharks: Outside the Cage
programme.desc: Steve Irwin ventures into the oceans around Australia to study many of the more placid and harmless sharks. Among the 'friendly' species he encounters, nothing compares to the spine chilling experience of being confronted by dozens of huge Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Croc Live
programme.desc: No cuts, no edits, no dress rehearsal. Join the Crocodile Hunter live from Australia.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodile Coast
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi venture along the west Australian coast in search of crocodiles and sharks. They encounter wild crocodiles in the thick oozie mud of the Kimberley Coast. Also, on a reef off the coast, Steve dives with a mass of sea snakes.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi swim with dolphins, seals and sharks. Steve dives to the ancient wreck of the Batavia and explores a habitat of Tamar wallabies and pythons.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Tigers of Shark Bay
programme.desc: Steve learns how to trap an eleven-foot tiger shark in a plastic bag and catch a tiger by the tail in Western Australia's Shark Bay.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert & The Rattlesnakes
programme.desc: Robert wrangles Western Diamondback rattlesnakes in Arizona for the first time, learning techniques.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco the Croc's Big Move
programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo. Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem. Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Manta Rays
programme.desc: Robert travels to Australia's Great Barrier Reef to help conduct research on manta rays. The Zoo's Rescue Unit, Wildlife Hospital and Volunteers team up to save a baby wallaby struggling to survive. Bindi gets up close and personal with Archie the Dingo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: Movie: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover as white women in an effort to protect hotel heiresses, the Wilson Sisters, from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Movie: What Men Want
programme.desc: A woman sports agent who feels held back in her male-dominated career due to her inability to connect with men becomes able to read men's innermost thoughts, and uses the ability to improve her life life while racing to sign a basketball star.

programme.desc: A couple's desert farmhouse looks more like a barn, and Leyla Jaworski uses sensors to create a design plan that completely reshapes the out-of-date home. She'll have to push through client concerns and unexpected delays to deliver this family dream home.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Small House, Great Neighborhood

programme.title: Love It or List It: Kitchen Catastrophe
programme.desc: Chris and Maria moved into their home with two kids, but now with four children, the house and its tiny kitchen feel cramped and cluttered. Maria wants a home with a gourmet kitchen closer to her work to shorten her commute.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Happy Trails, Unhappy Home
programme.desc: High school sweethearts that purchased a starter home near their beloved bike trail are now desperate for more space. They love to host gatherings, but the main floor is cut off and the dining area only seats four.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Parents and the Pantry

programme.title: Movie: Deceitful Dating

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin find themselves in hot water when a motorcycle pullover goes south. Later, a woman brings in her recovered IROC-Z and leaves with a genius thief-busting solution.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rockabilly Roadster
programme.desc: Danny and the boys give away a perfect hot rod at the annual Rockabilly Reunion at Lake Havasu. Later, a lady biker stuns the boys with a custom order for the bike of her dreams.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Old School
programme.desc: Shane's fiancée Tanya wants to return a favour by returning Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory. Later, Danny and Kevin find a rare Plymouth Roadrunner and help a portrait artist honour our fallen heroes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Zombie Truck
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. Later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour that kicks off in just seven days.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tour de Pants
programme.desc: A customer is brought to tears when the shop presents him with a chopper dedicated to his lost mother. Later, Danny surprises his band member with a hippy van, while Mike and Scott race to settle a score.

programme.title: Counting Cars: School of Rick
programme.desc: The Count takes a chance by building a low-rider with a Count's Kustoms twist. Later, a businesswoman commissions the shop to surprise her husband with his very first bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Pimp My Bus
programme.desc: Kevin disapproves of how much money Danny is spending tricking out his dream FMC Motorhome, but Danny has a surprise plan to help him get over it. Later, he builds a movie replica bike to commemorate a customer's lost friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: Danny lets painter Ryan take the lead on a 1959 Chevy Panel Truck project he hopes to flip, and later motivates his crew to clean up the shop with an inter-departmental build competition.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Run It Like You Brung It
programme.desc: Mike gifts all the guys with their own drifter trikes, under one condition; they must customize them, and then race them at the local track. Everyone is up to the challenge, everyone except Kevin.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mo' Parts Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Danny is doubly-blessed when a his-and-hers restoration is commissioned for a 1970 Plymouth Road Runner and a 1970 Dodge Coronet. Plus, Roli hopes to become the next airbrusher, but Ryan and Mike have other plans for him.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Champion Chopper
programme.desc: When the World Series of Poker guys want a Count's Kustoms chopper as the ultimate online giveaway, Danny is determined to make it something special, without looking like a billboard.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part One
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Love Buick
programme.desc: A couple from Miami enlist the Counts Kustom crew to raise money to combat a rare disease. Meanwhile, Ryan and Shannon restore a 1954 Harley Davidson Panhead motorcycle to its former glory.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of Apocalypse Island

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Cursed Paradise
programme.desc: Two couples arrive on the same remote island in the Pacific looking for paradise. Soon, all that either of them finds is trouble. When one couple emerges months later, the FBI will spend years deciphering exactly what happened.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lake Erie is home to more than 2,000 shipwrecks mostly due to it's shallow bottom. For local fisherman, Chris Leclair, navigating a double life proves just as treacherous. When his wife, Karen uncovers his dark secret he's caught in a net of lies.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Cursed Paradise
programme.desc: Two couples arrive on the same remote island in the Pacific looking for paradise. Soon, all that either of them finds is trouble. When one couple emerges months later, the FBI will spend years deciphering exactly what happened.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder on the Reservation
programme.desc: On the northern Cheyenne Indian reservation, a young mother goes missing after the Fourth of July. When her body is discovered in the woods, the victim's family dig through the memories of their loved one to provide investigators with critical clues.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Night on the Parkway
programme.desc: In the great smoky mountains of North Carolina, Billy Carter raises his daughters Crystal and Misty. When a body is found on the scenic Blue Ridge Parkway, this family's piece of paradise becomes a nightmare they relive again and again.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Killer Hand
programme.desc: A teen embarks on a journey to bring justice to the killer of his family, but must succeed before someone else dies.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Lake House
programme.desc: In 1980, in Radford, Virginia, college freshman Gina Hall goes out dancing and never returns. Police follow her trail to a mysterious lake house, but where she goes from there is a mystery that has endured for 40 years.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Kind of a Vicious Person
programme.desc: Apache County Sheriff's Office begins a double homicide investigation after the gruesome discovery of an elderly couple's remains in Sanders, Arizona. A statewide hunt for the perpetrator challenges veteran investigators resulting in an unusual arrest.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: When 9-year-old Annaijh Rolax and 15-year-old Shawn Powe are murdered in the city of Atlanta, the Atlanta Homicide team are driven more than ever to find justice for these young victims.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Down by the River
programme.desc: In a harrowing call, a terrified woman tries to give police clues: there's a gun, she's near a river, and her kids are at risk. After police find her body in the river, they learn a stomach-churning truth about a killer who's been a predator for years.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: See No Evil: In His Father's Footsteps
programme.desc: The ambush of 22-year-old college student Richard Bailey on October 20, 2008, leaves a community desperate for answers. With no forensic evidence left at the scene, detectives turn to surveillance footage to track down Richard's killer.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the coastal crossroads of the South Savannah, Georgia, where the food in influenced by rich culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of weird and wild Portland, OR, a city whose personality is apparent in its food culture. Local favorites include boozy doughnuts, Thai fish sauce chicken wings and even crawfish boils.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Guayaquil
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the tropical and frenetic coastal cuisine of Guayaquil, Ecuador. Bright flavours and local ingredients define their gastronomy, and Andrew tries everything from red mangrove crab to a plantain dumpling studded with crispy pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Original Inventions
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks back on favorite dishes that are also original inventions. Whether they were created out of necessity, the result of a happy accident or icons dreamed up for royalty, the origins of these edible icons are one-of-a-kind.

programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple RV
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky
programme.desc: When the mysterious 'hooks' suddenly appear, Mr. Krabs warns SpongeBob to stay away from them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in trouble when he lies about throwing a peanut at and upsetting an oyster.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: When Patrick's parents come over for Starfish Day, Patrick gets upset that they still think he isn't very smart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: Plankton gets a regular customer at the Chum Bucket which surprises everyone, including Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: World's Biggest Great White?
programme.desc: Deep Blue, believed to be the largest shark ever photographed, surfaces in Hawaii.

programme.title: Shocking Sharks
programme.desc: Venture into a world of ludicrous-looking, bizarrely behaved and downright Shocking Sharks to discover a new side to these feared fish. The tasselled wobbegong uses frilled camouflage to blend into coral reef surroundings.

programme.title: World's Biggest Great White?
programme.desc: Deep Blue, believed to be the largest shark ever photographed, surfaces in Hawaii.

programme.title: Shocking Sharks
programme.desc: Venture into a world of ludicrous-looking, bizarrely behaved and downright Shocking Sharks to discover a new side to these feared fish. The tasselled wobbegong uses frilled camouflage to blend into coral reef surroundings.

programme.title: Amphibia: Ivy on the Run/ After the Rain
programme.desc: Fed up with her mother's strict rules, Ivy devises a plan to run away. Then, Anne asks Hop Pop to retrieve the music box, bringing some long-buried secrets to light.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: The First Temple
programme.desc: Marcy, Anne and the Plantars travel to an ancient temple that could hold the key to getting Anne and Marcy home, but only if they can survive the temple's deadly challenges.

programme.title: Amphibia: New Wartwood/ Friend or Frobo
programme.desc: Intent on winning over Wartwood, Marcy makes a plan to improve the town. Then, Desperate for fun, Polly breaks out and finds an unlikely new friend in the process.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad to Redemption/ Maddie & Marcy
programme.desc: Mayor Toadstool is offered his dream job but realizes he doesn’t want to leave Wartwood. Maddie is working on an important spell, but her three sisters keep getting in the way.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Greatest/ The Egg
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia try to soften the heart of Lord Hater’s new giant flying battle beast by reuniting it with its lost egg.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Picnic/ The Fugitives
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia are fugitives on a distant planet, but Wander keeps messing up Sylvia's escape plans to come to the aid of strangers who need help.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Good Deed/ The Prisoner
programme.desc: Each time Wander does a good deed for someone, it causes something more horrible to happen to someone else, and he begins to doubt whether good deeds are worth doing.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Pet
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia come across an abandoned spaceship and inside encounter a horrible alien monster that wants to eat them.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Bad Guy/ The Troll
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia crash on an asteroid populated by outlaws, so Sylvia convinces Wander to act like a real bad guy to fit in.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Little Guy
programme.desc: When the tiniest Watchdog cadet, Westley, is accidentally left behind on a planet, Wander and Sylvia befriend him and pretend to be his prisoners to help him reunite with Hater.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Great Revolution! Legend Festival!
programme.desc: It’s time to get hyped! With the curtains finally open on the Legend Festival, Blading legends and challengers alike are gathered for the ultimate showdown. The first stage: battle royale!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Hyuga and Lain vs Hikaru and Aiger!
programme.desc: Participants in the Legend Festival are off to compete in the second stage! Next up is a series of team battles starting with Hyuga and Lain taking on Hikaru and Aiger. Meanwhile, Valt, Free, Rantaro, and Silas prep for their own battle.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Dewey must embrace his inner heel to beat the beloved Viking wrestling champ Jormungandr in a battle royale for the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Webby sets out to prove to a homesick Penumbra that Earth can be a lot of fun by riding Glomgold's newest gift to Duckburg, the suspicious Flintferris Glomwheel.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Goldie O'Gilt are turned into teenagers as they race Rockerduck to the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.desc: A man struggles to come to terms after the death of his father.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky
programme.desc: Rocky Balboa is a small time boxer longing for the chance to prove to the world how great he can be. When he finally gets the chance to fight the heavyweight champion Apollo Creed in an exhibition match, he sees it as his only chance to make it big.

programme.title: Movie: Zero Days
programme.desc: Examining Stuxnet, a self-replicating computer virus discovered in 2010 that was allegedly commissioned by the US and Israeli governments to sabotage Iran's nuclear program that opened up a Pandora's Box of cyber warfare.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?

programme.title: Movie: Replicas
programme.desc: After his wife and children are killed in a horrific accident, a grieving scientist turns to human cloning and cutting edge robotics to bring them back to life in a series of unethical experiments that have far-reaching and unforseen consequences.

programme.title: Movie: Going in Style
programme.desc: Three lifelong friends are caught in a desperate situation when their bank decides to freeze their pension payments after a robbery. With bills to pay and family to support, the three men go on a daring adventure and attempt to rob the bank themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Indiana Jones and his young side kick battle Soviets in a race to uncover the secrets behind a mysterious crystal skull.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You, Man
programme.desc: Peter has everything he wants. When he gets engaged, he realizes he doesn't have a male friend to act as his best man at the wedding. In search of a friend, he goes on a series of man-dates. The man he eventually chooses puts a strain on his relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Crisis
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of the opioid epidemic, various lives collide. While a drug trafficker conducts a multi-cartel operation, an architect tracks down the truth behind her son's disappearance. A professor makes an ominous discovery about his employer.
