programme.desc: Dr. Tristan Guttridge and Ornella Weideli conduct a study of what bring sharks of many kinds together, at various times of the year, and in various locations, to gather, swarm, and spiral.

programme.title: Shark Exile
programme.desc: Dr. Hazin has reduced the number of shark encounters using a catch and release method in Brazil, but can it work in Australia?

programme.title: Tiger Shark Invasion
programme.desc: Dr. Hammerschlag and Joe Romeiro team up with Alex Hearn in the Galapagos to study how tiger sharks have re-set one of the world's oldest marine ecosystems.

programme.title: Return to Shark Island
programme.desc: Reunion Island shark encounters are on the rise leaving the locals afraid to get in the water. Shark scientists investigate the ongoing shark crisis to find a way for sharks and people to coexist and live peacefully.

programme.title: Mako Nation
programme.desc: Shark expert Riley Elliot and underwater cameraman Andy Casagrande are on an epic expedition to uncover the mysteries of the mako shark in one of the last places on earth where these apex predators rule the waters.

programme.title: Alien Sharks
programme.desc: American and Japanese scientists descend into the deepest and darkest unexplored oceans on earth in search of some of the more incredible and bizarre sharks on the planet, from the goblin shark to the elusive, giant megamouth shark.

programme.title: SharkCam Stakeout
programme.desc: Dr. Greg Skomal and the Woods Hole team go to the Bahamas to investigate the private lives of bull and hammerhead sharks in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Abandoned Waters
programme.desc: Lack of human activity on the water caused by the global lockdown has led the largest great whites in South Australia to return to their natural behaviors. Shark experts can now study them up close and personal in ways that were nearly impossible before.

programme.title: Jackass Shark Week
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville sends Steve-O, Chris Pontius and new Jackass cast members on a Shark Week mission for the ages. They'll dial up a series of shark stunts that test their bravery and threshold of pain as they put common shark myths to the test.

programme.title: Ronda Rousey Uncaged
programme.desc: Olympian and UFC hall of famer Ronda Rousey gets help from Paul De Gelder to train through three rounds of survival training against three heavyweight opponents the bull sharks, to build to a 'main event' swimming uncaged with mako sharks.

programme.title: Laws of Jaws
programme.desc: Expert divers Liz Parkinson, Mike Dornellas, and Nick LeBeouf team up with Andy Casagrande to recreate real-life scenarios to learn about shark attacks.

programme.title: Great White Serial Killer Extinction
programme.desc: The Great White Serial Killer returns and it's on a killing spree that may push the California Sea Otter to extinction. Investigators deploy an otter dummy to get a closer look and witness one of the most spectacular attacks in Shark Week history.

programme.title: Crikey! It's Shark Week
programme.desc: Robert Irwin investigations which apex predator reigns supreme: crocs or great whites.

programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tami/ George
programme.desc: Tami is battling cancer but her extreme hoarding is getting in the way of her recuperation. George's hoarding has strained his relationships with his wife, daughters, and siblings.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tra/ Jill

programme.title: Hoarders: Julie and Shannon
programme.desc: A series of tragedies triggered massive hoarding, which in turn, led to Julie losing custody of her son to her ex-husband. 20 cats were removed from Shannon's home and now Child Protective Services have come to take her children.

programme.title: Intervention: John/ Dionicio
programme.desc: John loves his job as a flight attendant but is suffering from alcoholism.

programme.title: Intervention: Jimmy
programme.desc: Jimmy was raised by an alcoholic father, joined a gang at 13, and was soon on drugs. Now his addiction has him very close to death.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: OK Zoomer
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe help job seekers land their next big gig and pitch their memoirs to a focus group. The losing joker will deliver news heard around the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Film Fail
programme.desc: Learn why the Joker film in the produce section of grocery stores, what the guys tease Murr about and why the audio team had issues recording in a medical office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's dad has appeared on the show, and which natural disaster affected one of the challenges. Plus, learn how Sal came to own a replica of Van Halen's guitar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Scott's behavior takes a turn for the worse after learning that Kourtney officially has a boyfriend. Meanwhile Kourtney struggles to find her career passion, and Kris comes up with a creative way to preserve her memory long after she's gone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Kim fears for her surrogate's safety when sources begin exposing her personal information, Kris keeps a watchful eye on Scott during Fashion Week, and Kourtney deals with a scary infestation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris Jenner's Legacy
programme.desc: When Scott realizes that the girls know very little about Kris's history, he sets out to make her a commemorative legacy video. Meanwhile Kendall's anxiety strikes again right before Milan Fashion week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trimester Trouble
programme.desc: Khloé attempts to keep her pregnancy a secret while dealing with some complications, Kourtney questions whether she's done having kids, and Kris debuts a loud new hairdo.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Zendaya makes her debut as Lola Bunny in 'Space Jam: A New Legacy' and she’s telling us all about it.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Gender Reveal
programme.desc: The girls take one last sister getaway to San Francisco before their babies arrive, but they quickly get fed up with Kourtney's bad attitude. Kim wants to include her family is the surrogacy process, and Khloe anxiously awaits to hear her baby's gender.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Photo Shoot Dispute
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloé. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Art of the Prank
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé try to get to the root of Kourtney's bad attitude, which ignites another huge fight between the girls.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Drop Dead Gorgeous
programme.desc: Kris worries that pregnant Khloé is taking her healthy lifestyle too far and putting her baby at risk. Meanwhile Scott's business trip to Miami takes a wild turn, jeopardizing an exciting new business venture.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Game Day BBQ
programme.desc: The teams celebrate a classic BBQ tradition: tailgating. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson mentor their pitmasters as they explore BBQ that brings folks together to fire up their team spirit and their taste buds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creole, Cold Cuts and Crepes
programme.desc: Guy's cookin' up everything from creole to cold cuts to crazy Asian crepes. First, a multi-generational joint bringing New Orleans to Los Angeles with off-the-hook gumbo and etouffee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Po' Boys
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes a drive down memory lane and revisits a German joint in Brighton, Colo., known for their killer kraut and signature sausage specials. Then, at a stop in the Midwest, a mod-Mex menu is now showcasing mole smothered pork chop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Snacks, Apps and Twisted Mac
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits an old favorite he's been going to for years in San Francisco, but nowadays it's his buddy who's on the line serving up cod rillettes and chowder with a surprise ingredient.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Briskets
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into everything from chicken to brisket. In Fargo, N.D., a funky place is piling barbecue onto mac and throwin' heat into wings. A Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., is pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: All-Star Finale
programme.desc: The last two all-star food truck teams face off in a challenge with special ingredients from Chinatown. The teams compete for every last sale as the clock runs down, and in a thrilling elimination by the bay, host Tyler Florence crowns the winner.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: So Much Shade
programme.desc: Chopped's Scott Conant recruit’s actress Vivica A. Fox to help throw shade at Bobby Flay. Hoping Bobby freezes under the pressure are French master Chef Nico Romo and Caribbean enthusiast Chef Peter Prime.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF: Beat my Best Friend
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon enlists his pal, TV host Clinton Kelly, to distract Bobby Flay with their friendship. They get additional help from a French master, Chef Sylvain Delpique, and an Italian bread master, Chef Jackie Mazza.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Covered Clash
programme.desc: Chef Michael Voltaggio gets help from an extra special guest, celebrated actress Drew Barrymore, to take down Bobby Flay. They bring in fantastic pastry chefs DaVee Harned and Miriam Rieder Taylor, who have a passion for chocolate.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Pioneering Ordeal
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli links up with the Pioneer Woman, Ree Drummond, to orchestrate a loss. Two southern gentlemen, Atlanta's Jamarium Banks and Vince Giancarlo from Charlotte, North Carolina won't be playing nice as they try to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fiesta in A Flash
programme.desc: The Kitchen is gearing up for a food-filled fiesta with Sunny Anderson's Sizzlin' Chicken Fajitas and Katie Lee's Easy Chorizo and Potato Enchiladas with a Five Ingredient Sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Out and Cook

programme.title: The Kitchen: License to Grill

programme.title: The Kitchen: Raise the BBQ

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Round One to the Hot Crazy Chick

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Was Saliva, Alan
programme.desc: Frankie is forced to explain why she is in hiding with her eight-year-old daughter, Joanie. While both brothers are interested, only one of them manages to win her heart. Meanwhile, Jake is disinterested in Joanie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sisters

programme.title: Roseanne: Lost Youth

programme.title: Roseanne: Husbands and Wives

programme.title: Roseanne: Happy Trailers

programme.title: Roseanne: The Birds and the Frozen Bees

programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.desc: After trying to squeeze their large, blended family into a tiny two-bedroom house, a couple finally decides they need to build bigger. Brian and Mika step in to help with the difficult design choices to nail down this couple's style and start building.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Big Move From the Big Apple
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple is tired of squeezing into their Brooklyn apartment, so they're making a big move closer to family in Florida. She wants something edgy while he prefers to play it safe, and Brian and Mika must help them decide on a design remotely!

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Bringing Home Baby
programme.desc: A couple is ready to move out of his parent's home and start a new life with their baby right next door. Building on sentimental property is an exciting task for Brian and Mika, but first they'll have to clear a lot filled with decades of collectibles.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Jungle to Dream Oasis
programme.desc: Brian and Mika are challenged to turn an overgrown lot into a dream home for an expecting family. The homeowner is also a chef who has stipulations about his kitchen, meaning Brian and Mika have their work cut out for them to create the perfect property.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: From Demo to Dream Home
programme.desc: A basketball player and his family who have been moving annually for 13 years are ready to settle in Florida. The old construction on their lakefront house lacks safe support in a flood zone, so Brian and Mika must demolish and rebuild the entire home.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Shared Space to Dream Place
programme.desc: A couple bought their dream property years ago but are living with his mother due to financial setbacks. The family is ready to build a home of their own, but Brian and Mika must find a way to combine her understated style with his over-the-top taste.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Can This House Be Saved?
programme.desc: A young woman whose father died when she was a child inherited her family home, but it has been empty for years. She comes to Ben and Erin to see if the house can be saved with her $120,000 budget or if her money is better spent on another property.

programme.title: Movie: Young, Stalked and Pregnant
programme.desc: A teenager finds herself pregnant after being accepted to a top university. She is determined to have the future she wanted, but her boyfriend cannot accept this and decides to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Monitor Murders
programme.desc: A babysitter returns from her senior year at college and accepts a job. While working, she uncovers what she thinks is a murder plot over the baby-monitor.

programme.title: Movie: Mommy's Deadly Con Artist

programme.desc: The wealthy Jones family dominates the town of Pacific Hills. After the death of patriarch Theodore Jones, his second wife, Robin, assumed control of the family business. Now someone is coming after the family, trying to beat them at their own game.

programme.title: Movie: Pat and Mike
programme.desc: Romance blooms between a female athlete and her manager.

programme.title: Movie: Million Dollar Mermaid
programme.desc: A swimming champion's new manager arranges several publicity stunts to make her a star.

programme.title: Movie: Grand Prix
programme.desc: Auto racers find danger and romance as they compete in the legendary European road race.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Lies
programme.desc: Two school kids transform into crime-fighting superheroes to save Paris.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One
programme.desc: While on vacation, the Ross family finds a girl stranded in the middle of the ocean and invites her aboard their yacht. Meanwhile, Bertram stays home and babysits Mrs. Kipling, who has separation anxiety from Ravi.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Two
programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Three
programme.desc: Jessie abruptly ends the Ross family vacation because the kids are constantly fighting. They wind up in a pickle when they find the yacht the next morning floating in the middle of the sea with no captain or crew in sight.

programme.title: Disney Channel Special: Holidays Unwrapped
programme.desc: Raven Symone hosts a spectacular holiday special filled with many guests and fun performances, including the premiere of a music video for 'Descendants 3'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Duck the Halls: A Mickey Mouse Christmas Special
programme.desc: Donald decides to stay home for the holidays instead of migrating somewhere warmer. To celebrate this special time, Mickey hopes to make Donald’s first Christmas the greatest ever.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Mad About Yuletide
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and the Baxter/ Grayson family are trying to make the best of the holiday when a storm hits and disrupts their plans to celebrate together at a cabin on the lake. Snowed in at three different places, they all must lean on each other.

programme.title: Jessie: Good Luck Jessie: NYC Christmas
programme.desc: PJ and Teddy travel to New York, but a blizzard prevents them from leaving to get home in time for Christmas. When they meet Jessie on the subway, they are invited to a Ross family holiday. Meanwhile, Gabe is not in the holiday spirit to go see Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Good Luck Charlie, It's Christmas!
programme.desc: The Duncans get separated en route to Palm Springs, and with just days left before the holiday, everyone scrambles to reunite the family. In true Duncan fashion, and not without facing some hiccups, they discover a whole new meaning of family.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Camp Creepy-Waka
programme.desc: When issues arise between her campers, Lou's 'Scary Story Night' helps them work through their differences.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Mile
programme.desc: With the Congressional Fitness Test coming up, Gabby dreads her least favorite physical activity - running! She devises a plan to get out of it that causes mayhem for Swift.

programme.title: Jessie: 101 Lizards
programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Voltage-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie enlists Liv's help to build a giant Paulie Porcupine head for the Homecoming parade, but Joey and Parker accidentally destroy it while playing around with a stunt-prop from Liv's TV show, 'Voltage'.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: SPARF-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie and Diggie try to 'out fun' each other at a local music festival as Liv tries to help Andie get over her breakup.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Last Dances and Last Chances
programme.desc: After Austin confesses to Carrie that he'd rather be at the prom with Ally, Carrie warns him that he'd better show her sister the best time ever. Trish runs back and forth between Jace and Chuck until Sun Hee takes Chuck back.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Beauties and Bullies
programme.desc: Trish lands the lead role in the school play, but when she reads mean-spirited online comments, she wants to quit the production. Austin and Ally write a special song for Trish to help her understand that she's not alone.

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal

programme.desc: When Luke becomes the brain of the family and Zuri the new trendy fashionista, Ravi and Emma feel their identities have been stolen.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Desert Kings
programme.desc: The ancient city of Samarra contains a series of medieval structures that hold secrets to one of the world's greatest empires; now, archaeologists use pioneering technology to investigate its astonishing rise to power and reveal its monumental downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Lost Coliseums
programme.desc: The coliseums of Rome were brutal theaters of spectacle and death that helped control the sprawling Roman empire. Now, archaeologists uncover the engineering secrets behind these majestic structures to reveal the truth behind the ancient Roman world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Lost Coliseums
programme.desc: The coliseums of Rome were brutal theaters of spectacle and death that helped control the sprawling Roman empire. Now, archaeologists uncover the engineering secrets behind these majestic structures to reveal the truth behind the ancient Roman world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Desert Kings
programme.desc: The ancient city of Samarra contains a series of medieval structures that hold secrets to one of the world's greatest empires; now, archaeologists use pioneering technology to investigate its astonishing rise to power and reveal its monumental downfall.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Piltdown Man
programme.desc: The archaeological world is fooled for nearly half a century when an ape-like skull that's claimed as solid evidence for Darwin's theory of human evolution is proven fake. Using new research, experts investigate and uncover the identity of the forger.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Minoan Enigma Relic
programme.desc: A strange 3,000-year-old relic found in an ancient Minoan palace is marked with enigmatic images that no one has ever managed to decode, but now, using cutting-edge technology, experts might finally reveal its secrets.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Relic That Sees the Future
programme.desc: A bizarre 3,000 year-old gold relic crafted with intricately designed cryptic patterns is believed to form a highly complex celestial code. Using advanced imaging technology, experts speculate that it could be an ancient device for predicting the future.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Treasure Scrolls
programme.desc: A bizarre find called Copper Scroll is one of the famous Dead Sea Scrolls, but it's unlike any of the others. This strange relic might hold clues to a long-lost treasure, and cutting-edge science may finally reveal answers to this billion-dollar mystery.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Ancient Alien Computer
programme.desc: An ancient piece of corroded metal is more than it seems. An alien-looking device of intricate dials and cogs. Using cutting-edge imaging technology, experts examine what could actually be a 2,000-year-old computer.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Black Mirror
programme.desc: The Obsidian Mirror is a mysterious artifact crafted from volcanic rock, and it's said to be a supernatural device used to communicate with angels and spirits. Experts use cutting-edge tech to discover who made this strange relic and why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: See No Evil: Meet Me at Midnight
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, 24-year-old Ryan Lane receives a late-night call and heads out to meet the mystery caller. He is never heard from again. Calgary Police Service turns to surveillance video to locate Ryan and finds evidence of a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Quickly, I'm Afraid
programme.desc: In Danville, Kentucky, a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead. Detectives struggle to identify the suspect, their only lead is a mysterious silver van. Using a trail of video to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Found Them in Storage
programme.desc: When Wilda Gadd married with Howard Willis, she dismissed the rumors about him. Not until she found herself wearing a wire and risking her life to find dismembered bodies did she finally realize the truth: Howard's secret life was darker than any rumor.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Said I Killed My Brother
programme.desc: Eric Nance expects his sister Belinda to find and destroy his murder weapon to protect him. When she finally locates it, Belinda is torn between family loyalty and doing what she knows is right. Her choice will either shield him from police or betray him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Should Die in Prison
programme.desc: Jon Eason hopes every day that someone will murder his son Dylan in prison. Dylan Eason's life sentence without parole doesn't appease his father, who admits wishing for his own son's death is horrible but feels Dylan deserves it for his 2016 crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice For Ahmaud
programme.desc: The shooting death of Ahmaud Arbery made international headlines. Now, the prosecutor and the defense attorneys sit down for their first in-depth network television interview.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: When, Where and Who?
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old girl vanishes from her front porch, police must uncover when she was last seen, where she might have been going, and who would have wanted her dead.

programme.desc: Jon Eason hopes every day that someone will murder his son Dylan in prison. Dylan Eason's life sentence without parole doesn't appease his father, who admits wishing for his own son's death is horrible but feels Dylan deserves it for his 2016 crimes.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Found Them in Storage
programme.desc: When Wilda Gadd married with Howard Willis, she dismissed the rumors about him. Not until she found herself wearing a wire and risking her life to find dismembered bodies did she finally realize the truth: Howard's secret life was darker than any rumor.

programme.desc: Infamous sex abuse sports doctor attacked by angry parent; a gang member, a snitch and the F.B.I. collide; defiant defendant curses out judge; murderer taunts mother of two teenage sons; singing for a lenient sentence; prisoner meets his baby in court.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping
programme.desc: The murder of Nancy Phister, an A-lister and socialite in a town famous for its glitzy ski resorts and celebrities, is investigated.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of Nancy Phister continues.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Curtain Call

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Shady Space With a View
programme.desc: The biggest demo in Mega Decks history gets underway by tearing down 1500 square feet of stucco. Then steel framing and beams go up to support three different roof styles. Replacing the stucco with rails and a staircase opens up the views for the family.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Freak Show of Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is sampling the craziest and most delicious funnel cakes from across the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now
programme.desc: Noah visits the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the Topfield Fair in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King Crab and I
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Alaska State Fair, which is older than the state itself! He tries some local fresh seafood and state secrets, including the sasquatch sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Snackmasters: Shreddies
programme.desc: Fred Siriex challenges highly respected chefs Daniel Clifford and Claude Bosi to reproduce a breakfast icon, Shreddies cereal. The chefs have three weeks to not only replicate the flavor but also the famous lattice pattern and layered structure.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The New South
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are all about mixing old traditions with new flavors in the mountain town of Asheville, North Carolina. Nestled in the Appalachian Mountains, Rutledge and Damaris discover hip, true-to-the-region cooking.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Smokey Mountain Majesty
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood continue their tour in Knoxville, Tennessee, a city that insists on using only the freshest regional ingredients for its spectacular Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Siesta Fiesta
programme.desc: Bobby may only have a few Spanish words in his repertoire, but when it comes to Spanish cuisine, he's a true aficionado.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A Royal Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby makes a brunch fit for the queen with this English inspired menu.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ohio State Fair/ North Carolina Potato Festival
programme.desc: In Ohio, Noah tries the pulled pork donut and goes fishing in North Carolina for Calabash flounder.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Fertile Fields to the Red River Valley
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota where he goes local with the North Woods Sandwich and Barbe-chos, and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the Redneck Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City
programme.desc: Noah begins his journey at the Royal Winter Fair in Toronto, Canada, where he says "yes, cheese" to the blue balsamic. Later, he ends his culinary adventure at the State Fair of Louisiana with the sweet Not Yo' Average Nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boston, Ma

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas

programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part One
programme.desc: Ezra inadvertently messes up one of Kanan's missions and is forced to escape with the crew of the Ghost in order to survive. The boys find out Kanan and his team are freedom fighters, and their next assignment is freeing Wookie prisoners.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part Two
programme.desc: During his attempt to save the team from the Imperial trap, Ezra is captured by Agent Kallus. The rebels rescue the kid and set off on their original mission: to liberate the Wookiees destined for a terrible fate.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Droids of Distress
programme.desc: The rebels intercept a shipment of powerful weapons intended for the Empire, but the sale of the weapons doesn’t go according to plan when a frightened C-3PO calls the authorities.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Fighter Flight
programme.desc: Hera sends Ezra and Zeb into the city on a simple errand, but in a foolhardy stunt, the boys steal a TIE fighter instead. They wind up using the captured ship to free innocent prisoners en route to a labor camp.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Rise of the Old Masters
programme.desc: An underground broadcast reveals that the Empire is holding a Jedi Master prisoner. In a bold rescue attempt the crew of the Ghost voyages to the bleak prison world of Stygeon Prime only to fall into a trap engineered by the Inquisitor.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Breaking Ranks
programme.desc: Ezra infiltrates Lothal's Academy for Young Imperials, where the Empire identifies Force-sensitive children and indoctrinates the youths of Lothal into joining their ranks. With the help of cadet Zare Leonis, he gets vital information for the rebels.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Conquering the Ogre’s Dungeon!
programme.desc: In the end, Hyuga and Hikaru were no match for the legendary Blader Lui Shirosagi. Naturally, they both demand a rematch, but before the brothers can face Lui again, they have to conquer the Ogre’s Dungeon.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: Pin Kings
programme.desc: Two high school wrestling teammates, Alex DeCubas and Kevin Pedersen, and how their lives intersected through the world of drug trafficking, law enforcement and sports.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: A Mountain to Climb
programme.desc: The journey of Pratima Sherpa, a 17-year-old girl who was raised in a maintenance shed behind the third green on the Royal Nepal Golf Club and aspires to become Nepal's first female professional golfer.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Declan's Legacy
programme.desc: Notre Dame student Declan Sullivan was killed in a fall in 2010 while filming football practice. For the first time on television, Declan's family shares their story of that time and how Declan's legacy lives on through nearly 100 Chicago children.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Fight On: The Jake Olson Story
programme.desc: A look at the incredible story of USC long-snapper Jake Olson who made history as the first blind athlete to play in a Division I college football game.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Bonds of Earth
programme.desc: Learn how a soccer ball from astronaut Ellison Onizuka’s daughter’s teammates at a high school in Clear Lake, Texas, survived the tragic Challenger space shuttle explosion in January 1986 and finally completed its mission to space 31 years later.

programme.title: E:60: Forever Broncos
programme.desc: A powerful one-hour special on the Humboldt Broncos one year after the bus crash that killed 16 members of the junior hockey team from Canada, featuring exclusive access and never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Megalodon

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the impound lot, a rap star faces problems recovering his promotional truck. Staunch Philly ticket writer Brian seeks solace from irate citizens in his green acre. Garfield gets awful news.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Tiffany tries to find her inner serenity amidst the insults of angry citizens. At the lot, an angry mother tries to free her car after her son borrowed it without permission.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Even comedy can't help two jokesters get their car back from the impound lot. Meanwhile, Marilyn can't find a good man on her ticketing beat, and booters Elissa and Rob face serious mischief on the eve of Halloween.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: As the PPA deals with the tense aftermath of a fatal cop shooting, tow driver Frank is called to the scene of a volatile live stop. Glamorous ticket-writer Marlene encounters a chronic parking violator who ends up at the lot in search of her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot Tracey's extra nice style rubs the desperate owner of an impounded car the wrong way. Ticket writers Brian and Danielle take their football rivalry to the streets. Sherry and Garfield push their luck while booting cars downtown.

programme.title: An Animal Saved My Life: A Hero's Tail
programme.desc: A cat rescues a young boy from a vicious dog attack, and a K9 Chief puts his life on the line. Plus, a German Shepherd saves her owner during a medical emergency.

programme.title: An Animal Saved My Life: Creature Crusaders
programme.desc: A sea lion rescues a man who fell from the Golden Gate Bridge, and a German Shepherd leads a State Trooper to a house fire. Plus, a pair of terriers chases a bear that made its way into a home.

programme.title: Storage Wars: My Little Brony
programme.desc: The buyers head south to Oceanside, CA, which is Rene's backyard and he intends to make the competition pay for coming to his territory. Jarrod and Brandi discover that friendship can be magic and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon return to the site of their biggest score while the other buyers are focused on taking down the self-proclaimed 'King of Montebello.' Jarrod and Brandi land a locker that leads them to something called a 'Herbmeister.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: Up the Ante in El Monte
programme.desc: An auction in El Monte, CA has big lockers which means big money. Dave nabs a unit that shows he knows how to party and Rene tries to slice a bit of profit from a chilling find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: North Hollywood Hustle
programme.desc: The competition becomes fierce in North Hollywood and even Dan and Laura can't escape the tension. Dave scores a locker that may be a hit and Rene fights past the local buyers to have some fun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mr. Nezhoda's Opus
programme.desc: Dan and Laura take the buyers back to Torrance for an auction that has them battling for the best unit of the day. Ivy changes up his game to stunning results, Brandi puts Jarrod on a harsh budget and Dave takes on Rene against every locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Let the Daves Out
programme.desc: The buyers hit a vault auction in Huntington Beach where Dave decides to bring a few friends to help him out. Mary struggles to win a vault and keep her inexperience under wraps.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: The Inside Story: Jaws
programme.desc: Celebrate this classic and take a look back at the movie's origins, including the adaptation of a bestseller into the first real 'summer blockbuster' and how Spielberg broke new ground in location filming.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.desc: A peeping-Tom in the neighbourhood keeps using a drone to spy on Gloria sun-bathing, so Phil, Luke and Manny make it their mission to take it down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring Break
programme.desc: Claire does some spring cleaning while Phil struggles with not being a spring chicken when Luke starts outperforming him. Haley takes Alex to a music festival to take her mind off college. Gloria and Jay challenge one another to give up soaps and cigars.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down
programme.desc: Jay agrees to sub in on Cam's bowling team for the finals. Unfortunately Cam was not fully upfront about it being an all gay league, which puts Jay in a precarious position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Modern Family: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Alex's worst nightmare is realized when she gets news that she has to share the Valedictorian title with her number one competitor, Sunjay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Modern Family: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: Haley's attempt to stop Andy from proposing to Beth ends up with both Haley and Andy needing to cope with their emotions and both have their own special ways of doing so. Phil and Claire seem to only make matters worse.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are feeling a little snubbed by their kids when Alex intentionally gives them the wrong college move-in date to avoid making it a big deal. Meanwhile, Luke seems less than eager to spend the day with Phil at his open house.

programme.title: Botched: Double D-isaster

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Botched: Muscles, Tucks and Forehead Flaps

programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Jessie: Where's Zuri?
programme.desc: Stewart gets a new manny and when he clashes with Jessie she stops the play dates between Zuri and Stewart.

programme.title: Jessie: Spaced Out
programme.desc: Ravi gets an opportunity to go into space with Jessie and the kids as a birthday present. Unfortunately, he gets sick right before the trip and the others go without him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Mile
programme.desc: With the Congressional Fitness Test coming up, Gabby dreads her least favorite physical activity - running! She devises a plan to get out of it that causes mayhem for Swift.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: A Few Good Mentors
programme.desc: As part of a yearly 8th grade tradition, Syd and Olive get paired with two 6th graders to mentor.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Baking Bad
programme.desc: Booker, Nia and Tess discover a baking blogger is passing Nia's photo off as their own social media avatar while writing mean-spirited reviews. The kids try to unmask the culprit before Nia's real-life reputation is jeopardized.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Little Surprise
programme.desc: Nia, Booker, Levi and Chelsea secretly plan a big surprise party for Raven's birthday. Unbeknownst to her family, Raven accepted a job driving singing-sensation Sunrise Mahoney around and is sworn to secrecy.

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?
programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned
programme.desc: Emma is upset when her friends stand her up for the new girl in school. Meanwhile, Luke has Ravi help him with his project about India for their school's multicultural night.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cowbell-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv tries to help her new co-star Josh feel more comfortable in Stevens Point while the rest of the school prepares for Cowbell Week, a Stevens Point tradition.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Co-Star-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Casting is underway for Liv's co-star in 'Voltage' and some familiar faces show up for the auditions. Meanwhile, Karen arranges a 'cleansing ceremony' for Maddie to help her let go of her feelings for Diggie.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Videos and Villains
programme.desc: Video Countdown Live features Austin Moon's top ten videos which culminates in a live performance from Austin, however, the gang must rescue him from Brooke who is holding him captive.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Eggs and Extraterrestrials
programme.desc: When Dez, Trish and Austin convince Ally to attend the annual Zaliens Convention that's being held in Miami, Trish and Dez happen to stumble upon real Zaliens.

programme.title: Jessie: Katch Kipling
programme.desc: When Mrs. Kipling becomes a celebrity, it puts a strain on her relationship with Ravi. Meanwhile, Bertram preps Emma for an audition and Zuri tries to be more independent.

programme.title: Jessie: The Fear in Our Stars
programme.desc: Jessie has to relearn all the 'special skills' she listed on her resume for a commercial that she booked. Meanwhile, Ravi convinces Luke that a meteor is headed towards Earth.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather 2
programme.desc: Aurore Boreale gets akumatized again. Now Stormy Weather 2, she wants to prove her power by plunging the Earth into a never-ending winter. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to keep their cool if they want to stop her.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Ikari Gozen
programme.desc: Kagami's mother gets akumatized into Ikari Gozen. Armed with her bokken, she wants to punish Kagami for disobeying her, and to lock her up forever in the giant armour that forms her body.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Minding the Manor
programme.desc: When Sofia is left in charge of Aunt Tilly’s house, she must protect it from a group of invading gargoyles.

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Fliegel Has Landed
programme.desc: When an evil witch threatens Sofia’s troll friends, she must show the trolls how to stand up for themselves.

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo play The Quiet Game. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate, Winnie.

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Prime Queen
programme.desc: Prime Queen wants to face Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mayura (Heroes' Day, Part 2)
programme.desc: Hawk Moth has put his dreadful plan into action and re-akumatized all his former villains with Catalyst's help.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Featherwand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: The Heelers take a trip to Hammerbarn. Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy. Dad eats Bingo's last chip.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.
