programme.title: NCIS: Iceman
programme.desc: The team investigates when a marine thought to have frozen to death wakes up on Ducky's autopsy table. With the young man on life support, the team tracks his movements in the day before he was left for dead and discovers a secret trip to Baghdad.

programme.title: NCIS: Grace Period
programme.desc: The NCIS team discovers a tip about terrorist activity was a trap that resulted in the death of two agents. Blaming herself Agent Cassidy works with the team to track down the people responsible.

programme.title: NCIS: Driven
programme.desc: When a highly classified robotic vehicle called 'Otto' causes the death of a Navy Lieutenant, Gibbs and the team initially think the cause is suicide. When 'Otto' malfunctions and puts Abby's life at risk, the team realizes the machine has been sabotaged.

programme.title: NCIS: Suspicion
programme.desc: The team investigates when a high-level marine intelligence officer is found murdered in a small town motel room. The team discovers evidence of a potential terrorist cell, but Gibbs is wary since small town biases seemed to sway the first investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Sharif Returns
programme.desc: The team must track down a wanted terrorist who has obtained a missing, highly toxic chemical weapon. As the terrorist taunts them with phone calls, Gibbs and the team unite with Army Lt. Col. Hollis Mann to find him before he attacks American cities.

programme.title: NCIS: Blowback
programme.desc: Ducky comes out of his autopsy room and goes undercover to stop the illegal sale of the navy's top-secret weapon system. Meanwhile, Gibbs' curiosity is peaked when Jenny appears to have a personal vendetta against a wanted man.

programme.title: NCIS: Friends and Lovers
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates when the body of a young sailor is found in an abandoned building in a seedy part of town. Meanwhile, Tony bonds with one of the local detectives working on the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when an ailing navy lieutenant, who is an inspector for the International Atomic Energy Agency, may be the victim of radiation poisoning. Meanwhile, Tony is surprised when he sees a softer side of Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Skeletons
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team look for a potential serial killer when an explosion at a military cemetery mausoleum reveals a cache of dismembered human remains. Meanwhile, Abby turns to Gibbs with a personal problem.

programme.title: NCIS: Iceman
programme.desc: The team investigates when a marine thought to have frozen to death wakes up on Ducky's autopsy table. With the young man on life support, the team tracks his movements in the day before he was left for dead and discovers a secret trip to Baghdad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: True Legacy
programme.desc: The owner of a popular food truck is murdered and his body is left for his fiancée to find. What is originally thought to be a simple street rivalry leads to the Caldera family, a powerful political family who will do anything to maintain their dynasty.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Inhumane Society
programme.desc: The career of a young boxer is derailed when authorities discover he's at the center of a dog fighting ring. Things get much worse when his partner turns up dead.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Three in One
programme.desc: The body of a real estate agent is discovered in a basement and the investigation points towards three different suspects.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: A Father's Plea
programme.desc: When a celebration starts to sour, tempers flare and someone vanishes. Days later, a body is discovered in an unsavory part of a Northern California town. When the case goes cold, it will take a most unexpected plea to finally catch a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Alligator God
programme.desc: Deep in the Florida Everglades, detectives find a human head but no body. As they attempt to identify the victim, a Florida man comes forward with an unbelievable story.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Death & Taxes
programme.desc: When a prominent tax attorney is found strangled and locked inside a storm shelter, authorities are baffled. As disturbing evidence is uncovered, detectives wonder if those close to him may hold the answers.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Hurricane Homicides
programme.desc: When a mother and daughter are found brutally murdered, detectives wonder if a serial killer is lurking in Palm Beach. With a hurricane bearing down, police race to solve the murders before all the evidence is washed away.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Nice Guys Finish Last
programme.desc: The tranquility of the Florida Keys is shattered when a well-known resident is murdered in his home. As police scour the island for a killer, a bizarre trail leads them to a Florida man, and a series of shocking crimes.

programme.title: Snapped: Sante Kimes
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of an elderly New York socialite is the catalyst for the nationwide investigation into an unusual con duo, who treasure a luxurious way of life above all else, resulting in one of the biggest cases New York has ever seen.

programme.title: Snapped: William Rouse
programme.desc: The truth behind the brutal deaths of a prominent and wealthy couple in Libertyville, IL, remains dormant until 15 years later, when a new police task force exposes a murderer that let money remove their sense of consequence.

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy Campbell Ray
programme.desc: When a successful Texas lawyer and his wife are executed while sleeping in their bed, Houston police team up with a private investigator, who gets dangerously close to a killer, to uncover a greedy mastermind who proves that privilege can be deadly.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kamp Krustier

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Father's Watch

programme.title: The Simpsons: Caper Chase

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moho House

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dogtown

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Metal Library
programme.desc: Josh travels through the jungles of Ecuador to explore the watery depths of Tayos Cave for a legendary set of metal plates believed to be created by an advanced ancient civilization.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Secrets of the Star Disk
programme.desc: An ancient bronze disk adorned with gold may contain the oldest images of the cosmos ever discovered; using new research and the latest tech, experts investigate if this artifact could be the work of a prehistoric astrologer or just an elaborate hoax.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress
programme.desc: Images of earth from space reveal an intimate portrait of human activity; Cities glow bright while the wilderness remains dark; Why the Australian outback is lit up like a series of vast cities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Missing on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare becomes a reality when her 12-year-old son is abducted on Christmas Eve. Detective Waters soon learns this was not the first time the child went missing.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Obsessed with Celeste
programme.desc: 75-year-old retired TV executive Steven Beard is shot in his own home, but his wife, Celeste Beard, didn't pull the trigger. So why is she in prison for his murder? Her mom and husband are hoping Chris and Fatima can find out.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Flames of Passion
programme.desc: Claude Garrett says he tried to rescue his girlfriend, Lorie Lee Lance, from a fire that broke out in their home. But a jury decided he was the one who set the fire with one goal in mind: murder. Chris and Fatima will dig deep to find out what happened.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Body, a Trough, and 800 Pounds of Concrete
programme.desc: Tracy Fortson was the first female deputy sheriff of Oglethorpe County, Georgia. Her life came crashing down when she was convicted of her boyfriend's murder. But her family believes she was framed and want Chris and Fatima to help prove it.

programme.title: Death in the Deep
programme.desc: A new marriage quickly sours aboard a boat in the middle of the sea.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Murder in Cave Creek
programme.desc: Justin Lunsford, convicted of murdering a popular bartender after a night of sex and drugs, insists he's innocent. Now his brother and wife are asking Chris and Fatima to join their fight to free Justin.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ozark Enchantment
programme.desc: Trying to make her way in the Ozarks, Joy Dishneau set her sights on becoming a small business owner. But when she is found murdered in her own shop, all of her employees become suspects.

programme.title: Death in the Deep
programme.desc: A new marriage quickly sours aboard a boat in the middle of the sea.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Murder in Cave Creek
programme.desc: Justin Lunsford, convicted of murdering a popular bartender after a night of sex and drugs, insists he's innocent. Now his brother and wife are asking Chris and Fatima to join their fight to free Justin.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Flames of Passion
programme.desc: Claude Garrett says he tried to rescue his girlfriend, Lorie Lee Lance, from a fire that broke out in their home. But a jury decided he was the one who set the fire with one goal in mind: murder. Chris and Fatima will dig deep to find out what happened.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: My Murder Story: The Devil's Angels
programme.desc: A series of mysterious deaths have plagued a small community in Kansas. The thorough investigation of one determined detective reveals a sinister plot and proves that if it takes a village to raise a family, it only takes one person to destroy it.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Children of the Scorn
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest may be full of gloomy weather, but one local family sees only rainbows. Three generations of an established household appear to have it all until a stash of guns and a secret video reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Darkness Before Don
programme.desc: The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina make a perfect backdrop--for murder. Pillars of the community are pulled into a nightmare when affairs, abuse and embezzlement lead to someone losing their head.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Demon Inside
programme.desc: Charity seems like your typical teenager, she's a popular cheerleader with good grades and and works at the local pizza parlor. But to her mother and sisters, Charity is possessed by a demon that needs to be dealt with.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: In a small Tennessee town, Jenelle Potter has few friends. When her attraction to one of them isn't mutual, she is ostracized and feels threatened. Then a shadowy figure guides her family into a dark plot with a twisted ending no one saw coming.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Murder on Camera
programme.desc: Tiana Notice is young, beautiful, brilliant and lonely. That changes when she meets James Carter online. But when James reveals a dark secret, the two find themselves drawn into an increasingly dangerous and ultimately deadly battle of wits.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Criss-Cross Killer
programme.desc: When Veronica Bozza's body is found bleeding on her living room floor, it sends shockwaves through the close-knit community of Bridgewater. The murder plot leads Nashville's finest to uncover a bizarre unexpected twist right out of a Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Edge of War: MacArthur's Great Gamble

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Kitchen Drop In
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Cashiers, North Carolina, to build an antique log cabin in the middle of a huge, framed-out modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Reclaiming a One-Room Log Schoolhouse
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders go deep in the holler to reclaim a rare one-room log schoolhouse full of history. Back on the bone yard, the schoolhouse gets a whole new life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: West Virginia Legacy Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work on saving the O'Dell family's hand-hewn log home. Mark also spends some time with his own father and visits a log cabin built by his great grandfather.

programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson

programme.title: Good Eats: Squash Court II
programme.desc: Alton Brown cooks with summer squash.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montreal
programme.desc: Known as the City of Saints, Montreal, Canada, is blessed with a cuisine formed by global flavours. From poutine to smoked meat to hand-rolled bagels, Andrew Zimmern digs in to the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading to Quebec.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Charleston, Sc
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Charleston, SC, and his first order of business is paying a visit to the queen of soul food. Then, he chows down on Gullah cuisine, a favorite among locals, and indulges in fresh seafood.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern unveils must-have eats in Birmingham, Alabama. This southern city cherishes soul food classics like fried catfish and hushpuppies, barbecued chicken slathered in sauce, crunchy fried green tomatoes and refreshingly cool pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sitka
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Sitka, Alaska, where the preparation of iconic Alaskan staples like king salmon, venison and rockfish has evolved with finesse.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Pucker up and rev up your sweet tooth as host Alfonso Ribeiro explore snacks with the tongue-tingling twist of sweet and sour!

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Summertime
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to roll out those lazy days of summer the right way with our favorite summertime dishes! He contemplates if ceviche is really cooked, whether gazpacho came from the Good Book and what the cake in strawberry shortcake is.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Deli-licious
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to fill our bellies with delicious dishes from the deli. He's checking out how the bagel met cream cheese and lox, why black and white cookies keep the gray away and when pastrami on rye first piled things high.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game III: Oysters
programme.desc: Oysters are a mystery to many and downright spooky to some. Join host Alton Brown as he unravels the secrets of this bivalve, cracks a safe or two and reinvents classic applications.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful II
programme.desc: These days we're all looking for ways to make more out of less. Alton Brown's favorite strategy: flatten meats wafer thin and cover them with flavor. New looks at old classics like chicken Kiev, turkey piccata and beef paillard.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: The cocktail is a truly American art form that few Americans know much about. Alton sets up the basics of a bar, contemplates ice as an ingredient and properly prepares three classics that open the door to the world of cocktail mixology.

programme.title: Good Eats: House of the Rising Bun
programme.desc: Chef/ scientist Alton Brown whips up tasty breakfast breads.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pop Culture
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown investigates modern movie popcorn.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos
programme.desc: Americans love tacos, and Roger Mooking is scouring the country for the 15 best tacos around. The options for fillings range from pork to fish to alligator in hard, soft and even puffy shells.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat on a Stick
programme.desc: Roger visits two chefs in Texas who created the craziest cooking contraptions and prove that everything's bigger in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Black-ish: Working Girl
programme.desc: Bow struggles to adjust as she returns to work after maternity leave. Meanwhile, Ruby gives the twins a 'workaround' plan to get out of doing homework.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: All American: Int'l Players Anthem (I Choose You)
programme.desc: Billy and Spencer realize how much pressure the football team is feeling, but they may have a new ally. Jordan helps Olivia see what has been holding her back. Layla and Coop find out secrets to help explain what's going on.

programme.title: The Republic of Sarah: The Criminals It Deserves
programme.desc: Sarah drafts an executive order to help protect Greylock's residents. Grover introduces Danny to a new friend. Maya feels abandoned by everyone in her life. AJ ignores Corinne's advice when it comes to her relationship status.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pick
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals too much in a Christmas card.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Apology
programme.desc: Jerry is disturbed by his girlfriend's penchant for walking around the apartment naked. George looks forward to an apology from a friend who is going through the AA program. Kramer tries to maximize his time in the shower.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Meander to Your Dander
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Alan in the fine art of breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Frankenstein and the Horny Villagers
programme.desc: Alan meets an attractive woman who introduces him to the kind of sex Charlie is accustomed to.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: Barry and Lainey's wedding date is right around the corner, and Beverly is in her element as she tries to make everything perfect for her schmoopie's big day. Geoff is concerned about Adam's shortcomings as a wedding videographer.

programme.title: Mom: Charlotte Bronte and a Backhoe
programme.desc: Bonnie locks horns with Jill's 'inner strength' coach, Miranda. Also, Christy struggles to bounce back after being rejected from law school.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Bride of Prankenstein
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mike and Chuck work late to set up a security system at Outdoor Man and find the perfect target to prank when Joe arrives at the store. Meanwhile Mandy, Kyle, Kristen and Ryan hold a séance.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: This Bud's for You
programme.desc: When Mike's dad moves to town to build the new Outdoor Man store, Vanessa is concerned that some of Bud's well-intentioned ways might raise Mike's high blood pressure.

programme.title: Mom: A Catheter and a Dipsy-Doodle
programme.desc: Despite being extremely ill, Christy insists on taking her final exams. Also, Bonnie is furious when she suspects her boyfriend is cheating on her.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Spray Cat Strut/ Bad Case of Wine
programme.desc: Woman sues roommate for laptop replacement; manager sues wine seller for ruined dinner.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Saving Dog Bites Me in the Butt/ Parental Fat War
programme.desc: Man sued for rescuing dog; mom sues over trainer for daughter.

programme.title: Protection Court: Tasmanian Devil/ Climbed on My Car
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Parking Madness/ Dancing on My Cake
programme.desc: A woman sues for damage to her car; a bride sues for a damaged wedding cake.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Webster vs. House
programme.desc: A 20-year-old from Buffalo, NY seeks to prove a 48-year-old traveling pastor is the father of her 3-month-old daughter.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Cayce vs. Ewing/ Edwards/ Hawkins
programme.desc: After believing her father was deceased for her entire life, a Cape-Girardeau, MS woman is shocked to learn he’s alive.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lacey says Aldrickus failed to complete her dog grooming business, but Aldrickus says he paid money for materials and started framing the building, so he doesn't owe her the full amount.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff has a child with the defendant and said she wanted to marry him, but he was not ready to take the plunge and they drifted apart. She’s suing him for unpaid child support.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Letting His Lady Friend Down ' and 'Party Pooper.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Holding on Tight ' and ' Losing Control.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Bad Nanny/ Mangled Massage
programme.desc: Woman sues over release of nanny-cam footage; woman sues masseur for medical expenses.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Tyrine is suing Arisia for failure to reimburse her on faulty candles that were purchased. Arisia says she doesn't owe Tyrine anything as she made the candles and the customer got what she paid for.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Fiance Was Convicted of a Sex Crime, I Don't Believe It
programme.desc: Aceon did ten years in prison for statutory sodomy, but he claims he's completely innocent. Plus, Joshua was convicted of sex crimes as a teenager, and is now accused of molesting his fiancée's son.

programme.title: Maury: I'm the 6th Man You've Tested, I'm Not Your Baby's Father
programme.desc: Today, Cynthia has tested five different men in an attempt to find the fathers of her kids. She eventually was able to find the father to one of her children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: In Your Face
programme.desc: Ashley says that despite the fact that her good friend Dana has been distant towards her, she still wants to give her birthday gift that she deserves.

programme.title: Maury: I Need a 3rd DNA Test ... I Can't Believe I'm Back!
programme.desc: Tierra is back because Tyler is denying her baby. Breell is furious that Torrie is denying her son. Robert's family says Taya is a cheater and has placed doubts in his head.
